title: Faithless
description: Faithful to vanilla, yet a complete overhaul! - Building, Redstone, Survival, PvP... All in one.
body:
This pack aims to make Minecraft accessible to everyone, including
Full Colorblindness, Arachnophobia, Trypophobia, Hard of hearing and Dyslexia.
This pack gives nearly everything a unique texture for variance in builds and easy differentiation,
which may bring a fresh RPG experience, character and personality to everything in your game.
Heavy inspiration from Programmer Art and music videos such as Fallen Kingdom.
